title: Legacy 'Sets over time' chart (Workouts panel)
reason: CUT-2 Stage 3: invisible dead weight. Hidden in Analysis by the GRAPH-2 CSS and the standalone Workouts tab is gone, so the universal #waGraph is the only trend chart. Removed to shrink main.ts; kept here in case the per-set-range overlay is wanted back.
wiredInto: 5 standalone call sites in main.ts: renderWorkoutSetsChart(); (in the render* sequences after renderWorkoutsPage / renderWorkoutCalendar / renderDataTab / scoped-list rebuild x2)
restoreSteps: Re-add `let workoutSetsSvg: SvgChart | null = null;` to the chart-handles block in main.ts.
Restore the inner DOM of <details id="workoutSets"> in index.html (summary + body + #workoutSetsChart + #workoutSetsNote) — see workoutSetsChart.code.ts.
Re-add the 5 `renderWorkoutSetsChart();` call sites (after the renderWorkoutsPage/calendar/data calls).
npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build.
